prerequisites: An active Help Scout account with an invited, active user, since all API credentials must be associated with such a user.
OAuth2 application credentials (Client ID and Client Secret) created from Your Profile > My apps in Help Scout.
A start date to define the earliest point from which the connector replicates records.

authMethods.name: OAuth2 (Client Credentials)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates to the Help Scout Mailbox API 2.0 using the OAuth2 Client Credentials flow. Provide the client_id and client_secret from your Help Scout app; the Mailbox API exchanges these for a bearer access token (tokens expire after 2 days and are refreshed automatically). This flow is intended for internal integrations.

setupSteps.title: Create a Help Scout app
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Help Scout and go to Your Profile > My apps, then select Create My App. A redirection URL is required during creation; if you are using only the Client Credentials flow, a placeholder URL is acceptable. After creating the app, copy the generated Client ID and Client Secret.

setupSteps.title: Provide the OAuth2 credentials
setupSteps.body: Enter the Client ID into the client_id field and the Client Secret into the client_secret field. Both are required and are stored as secrets. The connector uses them to obtain a bearer access token from the Help Scout Mailbox API.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which the connector should replicate data. Records created or updated before this date are not pulled.
